summary: Tested P2 features: Bulk CSV import/export and Product image gallery. All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend admin shows Export/Import buttons and Gallery Images section. Product detail page displays interactive gallery with thumbnails and navigation when multiple images exist.
seed_data_creation: Temporarily added gallery images to product '2-Way OutBack Rock Speaker' for testing, then restored original state
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bulk import/export and gallery features working. Products collection has 217 items. Export CSV uses pipe-separated values for multi-value fields. Import matches by slug for updates. Gallery combines product.image (primary) with product.images (gallery) into one array. Thumbnails have gold border (#C9A962) when active. Navigation arrows and thumbnails only show when multiple images exist.

backend: GET /api/catalog/products/export - returns CSV with 218 lines (header + 217 products) ✓
GET /api/catalog/products/export - CSV has correct headers (name, brand, category, etc.) ✓
GET /api/catalog/products/export - multi-value fields use pipe separator ✓
POST /api/catalog/products/import - creates new products from CSV ✓
POST /api/catalog/products/import - updates existing products when slug matches ✓
POST /api/catalog/products/import - reports errors for rows missing required fields ✓
POST /api/catalog/products - creates product with gallery images ✓
GET /api/catalog/products/{slug} - returns images array in response ✓
frontend_admin: Export CSV button triggers file download ✓
Product form shows MultiImageUpload component with 'Additional Product Images (0/10)' label ✓
Product form shows 'Upload Images' and 'Add URL' buttons for gallery ✓
frontend_detail: /products/[slug] page shows image gallery with thumbnails when multiple images exist ✓
Gallery navigation arrows (prev/next) visible and clickable ✓
Clicking next arrow advances to next image ✓
Clicking prev arrow goes to previous image ✓
Single image products show clean view without thumbnails/arrows ✓
